item.title: Home 1
item.dc:creator: demouser
item.content:encoded:
Angelica WordPress Theme

Sell anything.
To anyone.
Accessibly!

Angelica is accessibility ready WordPress theme for creating inclusive online shops. Compatible with WooCommerce plugin and WordPress drag & drop block editor (Gutenberg).
